_comment: Test-count floor for scripts/checkTestCounts.mjs. Growth is always allowed; a drop must be a conscious edit here (mirrors the coverage-threshold ratchet pattern in vitest.config.ts). Regenerate via: pnpm test && pnpm -C functions test, then read testResults.length / numTotalTests from .vitest-reports/{root,functions}.json. 'rules' (tests/rules/**) is regenerated via 'pnpm run test:rules', reading the same fields from .vitest-reports/rules.json — it is optional (see checkTestCounts.mjs), so its absence never blocks validate/test:all.
